experimental.description: These features are still in development and may be incomplete or buggy.

support.description: Found a bug or have a feature request? File an issue on GitHub or drop into our Discord.
support.bugReportDescription: Describe what went wrong, generate a sanitized report, then paste it into Discord or a GitHub issue. The report bundles app and OS info plus the tail of your log; home paths, Steam IDs, bearer tokens, and emails are stripped before it leaves the app.
support.includeFullLog: Include full log (up to 5 MB; Discord auto-attaches as a file)
support.reviewBeforeSharing: Review before sharing. Nothing is sent automatically.

setupWizard.resetResult: Setup wizard will show on next launch.
setupWizard.title: Reset Setup Wizard
setupWizard.description: Show the first-run setup wizard again on next app launch.
setupWizard.confirmMessage: The first-run setup wizard will appear the next time you launch the app. Your settings and installed mods are not affected.

cache.previewDescription: 3D model stills, hero portraits, and locker card thumbnails. These rebuild automatically from your installed mods when next viewed. Your installed mods are not affected.
cache.wipeMessage: Removes cached mod metadata and sync state. Browse re-syncs from GameBanana next time. Installed mods are not affected.
cache.clearPreviewMessage: Deletes cached preview images to reclaim disk. They regenerate when you next view them. Installed mods are not affected.

autoexec.title: Autoexec Configuration
autoexec.description: Ensure autoexec.cfg exists for crosshairs and commands.

toggles.hideOutdated: Hide Browse mods older than the current game version.
toggles.expandLocker: Start Locker list view with hero cards expanded.
toggles.switchVariants: Installing a new variant disables the old one. Off keeps both active. Updates always replace the old file.
toggles.enableAfterDownload: Enable mods as soon as they finish downloading. Stays disabled if no slot is free.
toggles.confirmProfileUpdate: Confirm before overwriting a profile's saved mods. Off overwrites immediately.
toggles.ignoreConflicts: Hide all conflicts from the Conflicts page. Off shows them.
toggles.discordRpc: Show your current Grimoire activity on your Discord profile. Talks only to your local Discord app and sends nothing to Grimoire.
toggles.contributeSalts: Share the replay keys Steam already caches for matches you view in-game. Sends only the match id, server cluster, and two download keys: no account id, no username, nothing about you or your mods.
toggles.fixUnknown: Match unknown local VPKs against GameBanana to recover names and thumbnails. May hit rate limits on large libraries.
toggles.deadworks: Add a Servers tab to browse and join Deadworks community servers. Required content downloads before connecting.
toggles.performanceConfig: One-click fps boost using Sqooky's community preset. Mods keep working. Remove any time.

actions.importTitle: Load your current in-game crosshair settings into the editor

snapshots.snapshotNowTitle: Capture your current installed mods now. Use this before experimenting.
snapshots.tooltip: Snapshots are automatic recovery points taken before updates or profile applies.
snapshots.collapsedEmpty: Automatic recovery points captured before updates or profile applies. None yet - one will appear here the next time you run either.
snapshots.expandedEmpty: Grimoire takes a snapshot of your installed mod set automatically before each mod update and before applying a profile. Restore re-downloads those mods from GameBanana, so a bad update or wrong profile can be rolled back. Snapshots store only mod IDs, not VPK files, so disk cost stays tiny. You can also capture one manually before experimenting.

explanation.preUpdate: Captured before a mod update changed your installed set.
explanation.preApplyProfile: Captured before applying a profile changed your installed set.
explanation.manual: Captured manually from the Profiles page.

snapshots.restoreTitle: Opens the import dialog with this snapshot preloaded

confirm.updateMessage: Overwrite {{name}} with your currently enabled mods? The profile's saved mod list will be replaced and can't be undone. To load this profile onto your install instead, use Apply. You can turn this prompt off in Settings -> Preferences.
confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSnapshotMessage: Delete this recovery snapshot? You won't be able to restore from it later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_one: Delete {{count}} snapshot? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshot later.
confirm.deleteSelectedSnapshotsMessage_other: Delete {{count}} snapshots? Your installed mods are unaffected. You won't be able to restore from the deleted snapshots later.

layout.containsFilesThatArenTTypicalFor: contains files that aren't typical for a Deadlock mod:

layout.gamebananaIsRateLimitingGrimoirePauseA: GameBanana is rate-limiting Grimoire. Pause a moment before retrying.

cardcropper.couldNotRenderTheCropNo2d: Could not render the crop (no 2D canvas context).
cardcropper.dragToRepositionScrollOrUseThe: Drag to reposition, scroll or use the slider to zoom. The frame is locked to the card's aspect so the result is not stretched.
cardcropper.targetSoItWillBeUpscaledAnd: target, so it will be upscaled and may look soft.
cardcropper.thatImageCouldNotBeLoadedTry: That image could not be loaded. Try a different PNG or JPG.

herocardpicker.andClickTheAppliedCardAgainTo: , and click the applied card again to revert to default.
herocardpicker.cardArtFoundInYourInstalledMods: Card art found in your installed mods. Each mod may ship several portrait variants; click a card to apply that mod's full set for
herocardpicker.clickASlotToChooseAnImage: Click a slot to choose an image and crop it to that variant's exact size. Fill only the variants you want to change, then apply. Unfilled variants stay default.
herocardpicker.noCardArtFoundInYourInstalled: No card art found in your installed mods for
herocardpicker.saveThisCustomCardAsAStandalone: Save this custom card as a standalone .vpk file

herocolorpicker.bakingTheRecolorTheFirstTimeFor: Baking the recolor. The first time for a given pick can take up to a minute (it re-encodes every effect texture); the same pick is instant after that.
herocolorpicker.restartDeadlockForThisChangeToTake: Restart Deadlock for this change to take effect (addons mount at game start).
herocolorpicker.sAbilityColorsOverAChosenRamp: 's ability colors over a chosen ramp instead of the full rainbow. Pick a preset or Custom (a hue per stop); the sliders above rotate and tune it.
herocolorpicker.sAbilityEffectsParticlesProjectilesAndTh: 's ability effects (particles, projectiles, and the ult body). Pick a single color, a rainbow, a gradient, or a trippy pattern: one pick is active at a time.
herocolorpicker.sAbilityParticlesWithAFlowingProcedural: 's ability particles with a flowing procedural pattern. The pattern strength and phase are above; Animation sets how the particles move in game (Off bakes a still paint). Gun FX targets the weapon's effect particles (muzzle, tracers, impacts), not its skin (that's the Body + Gun tab). This shares the one-per-hero slot, so it replaces any color, rainbow, or gradient.
herocolorpicker.savedThisPickMountsTheNextTime: Saved. This pick mounts the next time you Launch Modded.
herocolorpicker.sExistingAbilityColorsAcrossARainbow: 's existing ability colors across a rainbow instead of one hue. Use the sliders above to rotate the spectrum and tune its saturation / brightness. Animated adds a moving sweep on the showy effects (glow, beams, trails).
herocolorpicker.sweepTheGradientOverEachEffectS: sweep the gradient over each effect's lifetime
herocolorpicker.sweepTheSpectrumOverEachEffectS: sweep the spectrum over each effect's lifetime
herocolorpicker.theSwatchAbovePreviewsThePatternAnd: The swatch above previews the pattern and its scroll speed (set by Animation strength). Sweep, Loop, and Cycle differ in how particles animate their color in game, which a texture swatch can't show.

heroeffectspanel.yetNoPinnedRecipeInTheBundled: yet (no pinned recipe in the bundled vpkmerge). More heroes are coming.

heroposeviewer.thisHeroCanTBePosedIn: This hero can't be posed in 3D yet.

herosoundpicker.groupedByTheAbilityEachOneChanges: , grouped by the ability each one changes. Pick one source per ability and it's isolated into a single Locker-managed sound that wins over your other mods; pick the applied source again to revert. Tune the applied source's volume and pitch with the sliders.
herosoundpicker.noSoundModForThisAbility: No sound mod for this ability.
herosoundpicker.noSoundModsTaggedForThisHero: No sound mods tagged for this hero yet. Tag one from Installed (multi-select then Tag).
herosoundpicker.restartDeadlockForTheseSoundChangesTo: Restart Deadlock for these sound changes to take effect (addons mount at game start).
herosoundpicker.savedTheseSoundChangesMountTheNext: Saved. These sound changes mount the next time you Launch Modded.
herosoundpicker.voiceLinesAndSoundsNotTiedTo: Voice lines and sounds not tied to a single ability. These toggle the whole mod on or off.

trippypatternpicker.liveSwatchUnavailableVpkmergeBinaryMissi: Live swatch unavailable (vpkmerge binary missing or too old).

trippyskinpanel.bakingThePaintTheFirstTimeFor: Baking the paint. The first time for a given combination can take a while (it re-encodes the affected textures); the same combination is instant after that.
trippyskinpanel.restartDeadlockForThisChangeToTake: Restart Deadlock for this change to take effect (addons mount at game start).
trippyskinpanel.savedThisPaintMountsTheNextTime: Saved. This paint mounts the next time you Launch Modded.
trippyskinpanel.sBodyAndGunTexturesWithA: 's body and gun textures with a flowing procedural pattern: the paint scrolls in game. This composes with anything applied on the Abilities surface.

crosshair.previewApproximatesTheInGameCrosshairAt: Preview approximates the in-game crosshair at the selected resolution. Dynamic spread bloom is not simulated.

crosshair.removeTheActiveCrosshairFromAutoexecCfg2: Remove the active crosshair from autoexec.cfg (presets are kept)
crosshair.renderThePreviewAtThisDisplayResolution: Render the preview at this display resolution's in-game size

discover.beTheFirstToPublishOpenProfiles: Be the first to publish: open Profiles, pick one, and click Publish to Discover.
discover.checkYourConnectionThenSwitchSortTabs: Check your connection, then switch sort tabs to retry.
discover.finishSigningInWithSteamInYour: Finish signing in with Steam in your browser. The header will update when you're done.
discover.modProfilesPublishedByOtherGrimoireUsers: Mod profiles published by other Grimoire users.
discover.opensSteamInYourBrowserGrimoireNever: Opens Steam in your browser. Grimoire never sees your password.
discover.pickALocalProfileAndPublishIt: Pick a local profile and publish it to Discover
discover.signInToLikeAndPublishImporting: Sign in to like and publish; importing works without an account.

installed.addCustomModImportAVpkFrom: Add custom mod: import a VPK from disk with a custom name and thumbnail
installed.aNewerVersionIsAvailableOnGamebanana: A newer version is available on GameBanana
installed.areYouSureYouWantToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
installed.autoDetectDownloadsCandidateArchivesFrom: Auto-detect downloads candidate archives from GameBanana and compares them byte-for-byte. It is slow and can hit GameBanana rate limits, especially when fixing many mods at once. The manual search above is faster and lighter.
installed.autoDetectEveryUnknownModThatHas: Auto-detect every unknown mod that has not already been checked (heavy, may hit rate limits)
installed.autoDetectIsOffEnableItUnder: Auto-detect is off. Enable it under Settings (Experimental Features) if you want to try it, but the manual search above is the recommended path.
installed.buttonOnAnyResultToOpenIt: button on any result to open it on GameBanana and download there directly.
installed.canTFindItOnGamebananaSave: Can't find it on GameBanana? Save it with a custom name instead.
installed.cardSizeAppliesToGridView: Card size applies to grid view.
installed.cardSizeDragToTheSmallEnd: Card size (drag to the small end for compact cards)
installed.changeTheNameImageOrNsfwMark: Change the name, image, or NSFW mark.
installed.clickOrDropAnotherToReplace: Click or drop another to replace
installed.copyingTheShareCodeToYourClipboard: Copying the share code to your clipboard failed. Click "Copy share code" below, then paste it into the portable-profile import flow to re-download the missing sources.
installed.couldNotBeFoundOnDisk: could not be found on disk.
installed.couldNotResolveTheDroppedFilePath: Could not resolve the dropped file path.
installed.couldNotResolveTheDroppedImagePath: Could not resolve the dropped image path.
installed.couldnTFindThisModSAuthor: Couldn't find this mod's author page
installed.findGamebananaMatchesOrAddCustomMetadata: Find GameBanana matches or add custom metadata for unknown local mods. Right-click to hide this button.
installed.findItOnGamebananaAndLinkIt: Find it on GameBanana and link it.
installed.fixOrderRenumberEnabledMods12: Fix order: renumber enabled mods 1, 2, 3, ... to tidy priority slots
installed.fixUnknownIsHiddenRightClickTo: Fix unknown is hidden. Right-click to bring it back.
installed.lockerOverridesReviewAndRemoveAppliedHer: Locker overrides: review and remove applied hero cards, ability sounds, and ability colors
installed.matchedModIsMissingGamebananaMetadata: Matched mod is missing GameBanana metadata
installed.name: Name
installed.noCachedMatchFoundQueuedForOnline: No cached match found. Queued for online search.
installed.noFilePathsFoundInThisVpk: No file paths found in this VPK.
installed.noGamebananaArchiveMatchedThisLocalVpk: No GameBanana archive matched this local VPK by CRC-32.
installed.noInstalledModsMatchTheActiveFilters: No installed mods match the active filters
installed.noResultsTryADifferentNameOr: No results. Try a different name or section.
installed.reDownloadEveryModFlaggedWithAn: Re-download every mod flagged with an available update. Each one's enabled state will be restored after the install finishes. Downloads run one at a time and may take a while.
installed.resultsUpdateAsYouTypeOrOpen: Results update as you type, or open GameBanana (or the Browse tab) side by side to find the mod, then search for it here. Linking tags this exact file: nothing is re-downloaded. Use the
installed.retryEveryUnknownModThatPreviouslyHad: Retry every unknown mod that previously had no match
installed.runAByteForByteSearchAgainst: Run a byte-for-byte search against GameBanana.
installed.showingASampleTheFullTreeLoads: Showing a sample. The full tree loads when expanded.
installed.tagSelectedModsForTheLocker: Tag selected mods for the Locker
installed.theShareCodeCapturedAtMergeTime: The share code captured at merge time is on your clipboard now. Paste it into the portable-profile import flow to re-download the missing sources from GameBanana.
installed.thisLocalModHasNoSavedGamebanana: This local mod has no saved GameBanana or custom metadata
installed.thisModIsDisabledAndNotLoaded: This mod is disabled and not loaded in-game
installed.thisRemovesEveryVpkInTheGroup: ? This removes every VPK in the group. To keep some, cancel and use the file picker instead.
installed.thisRemovesEveryVpkInTheSelection: ? This removes every VPK in the selection and cannot be undone.

locker.switchToListViewToSeeUnassigned: Switch to List view to see unassigned mods
locker.theseModsCouldnTBeMatchedTo: These mods couldn't be matched to a hero automatically. Tag one to move it into that hero's locker pile.
locker.thisModIsDisabledAndNotLoaded: This mod is disabled and not loaded in-game

lockerhero.downloadASkinForThisHeroTo: Download a skin for this hero to manage it here.

profiles.areYouSureYouWantToDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
profiles.automaticRecoveryPointsCapturedBeforeUpd: Automatic recovery points captured before updates or profile applies. None yet — one will appear here the next time you run either.
profiles.captureYourCurrentInstalledModsNowUse: Capture your current installed mods now. Use this before experimenting (mass-installing variants, testing a collection, etc.) so you can roll back to this exact state.
profiles.deleteThisRecoverySnapshotYouWonT: Delete this recovery snapshot? You won't be able to restore from it later.
profiles.deleteThisSnapshotFileOtherSnapshotsAre: Delete this snapshot file. Other snapshots are unaffected; your installed mods are unaffected.
profiles.enterProfileNameEGCompetitiveCasual: Enter profile name (e.g. Competitive, Casual, Testing)...
profiles.grimoireTakesASnapshotOfYourInstalled: Grimoire takes a snapshot of your installed mod set automatically before each mod update and before applying a profile. Restore re-downloads those mods from GameBanana, so a bad update or wrong-profile-applied can be rolled back. Snapshots store only the list of mods (their GameBanana IDs), never the VPK files, so disk cost stays tiny — they accumulate until you delete them. You can also capture one manually with the button above before experimenting.
profiles.importAPortableProfileFromAShare: Import a portable profile from a share code or file
profiles.opensTheImportDialogWithThisSnapshot: Opens the import dialog with this snapshot's mod list pre-resolved. Mods already on disk stay as-is; anything missing or different re-downloads from GameBanana. Confirming creates a new profile you can apply to swap your install set back to this state.
profiles.overwriteThisProfileWithYourCurrentMods: Overwrite this profile with your current mods
profiles.snapshotsAreAutomaticRecoveryPointsTaken: Snapshots are automatic recovery points taken before mod updates and profile applies. They store the list of installed mods (not the VPK files), and restore by re-downloading from GameBanana. Snapshots accumulate until you delete them.
profiles.withYourCurrentlyEnabledModsTheProfile: with your currently enabled mods? The profile's saved mod list will be replaced and can't be undone. (To load this profile onto your install instead, use Apply.) You can turn this prompt off in Settings → Preferences.

servers.browseAndJoinDeadworksCommunityDedicated: Browse and join Deadworks community dedicated servers.

settings.blurThumbnailImagesForModsMarkedAs: Blur thumbnail images for mods marked as NSFW.
settings.createCustomCrosshairsWithALivePreview: Create custom crosshairs with a live preview.
settings.describeWhatWentWrongGenerateASanitized: Describe what went wrong, generate a sanitized report, then paste it into Discord or a GitHub issue. The report bundles app and OS info plus the tail of your log; home paths, Steam IDs, bearer tokens, and emails are stripped before it leaves the app.
settings.devModeIsActiveDeadlockPathSelection: Dev mode is active. Deadlock path selection is disabled.
settings.ensureAutoexecCfgExistsForCrosshairsAnd: Ensure autoexec.cfg exists for crosshairs and commands.
settings.foundABugOrHaveAFeature: Found a bug or have a feature request? File an issue on GitHub or drop into our Discord.
settings.grimoireWasInstalledViaASystemPackage: Grimoire was installed via a system package. Update with your distro's tools:
settings.howUploadAndUpdateDatesAreShown: How upload and update dates are shown on mods and files.
settings.includeFullLogUpTo5Mb: Include full log (up to 5 MB; Discord auto-attaches as a file)
settings.manuallyAddTheAptRepositoryForAutomatic: manually? Add the apt repository for automatic updates (instructions at
settings.nothingToContributeYetSaltsAppearAfter: Nothing to contribute yet. Salts appear after you view match details in-game.
settings.pickTheLanguageThatShouldReceiveYour: Pick the language that should receive your translation suggestions.
settings.renameOneToGameinfoGiToRestore: . Rename one to gameinfo.gi to restore.
settings.reviewBeforeSharingNothingIsSentAutomati: Review before sharing. Nothing is sent automatically.
settings.selectYourDeadlockGameFolderContainsThe: Select your Deadlock game folder (contains the 'game' directory)
settings.showTheFirstRunSetupWizardAgain: Show the first-run setup wizard again on next app launch.
settings.signInWithSteamToPublishProfiles: Sign in with Steam to publish profiles and browse uploads from other players in Discover.
settings.sudoAptUpdateSudoAptUpgrade: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade
settings.switchVariantsInsteadOfStackingThem: Switch variants instead of stacking them
settings.text3dModelStillsHeroPortraitsAndLocker: 3D model stills, hero portraits, and locker card thumbnails. These rebuild automatically from your installed mods when next viewed. Your installed mods are not affected.
settings.theFirstRunSetupWizardWillAppear: The first-run setup wizard will appear the next time you launch the app. Your settings and installed mods are not affected.
settings.theseFeaturesAreStillInDevelopmentAnd: These features are still in development and may be incomplete or buggy.
settings.trackYourPerformanceWithDataFromThe: Track your performance with data from the Deadlock Stats API.
settings.updatesAreManagedByYourPackageManager: Updates are managed by your package manager.
settings.useADummyDeadlockDirectoryForLocal: Use a dummy Deadlock directory for local testing without game files.
settings.whatWereYouDoingWhenItBroke: What were you doing when it broke? (Optional but helpful.)

stats.addAPlayerFromTheDropdownIn: Add a player from the dropdown in the top right to see their stats.
